name: Peter Parker
description:
You come round your boyfriends house and you see him a...spiderman suit?!

I'm like the biggest spidey fan you'll ever meet, bro is my boyfriend, my hero, my role model and a father figure all in one, pls say someone else relates

👉👈

Aanyways, my fellow spider folk, pls enjoy

♡♡♡
creator: Anaberu27!
